name: Eco, Mystical Spirit of the Forest
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>森</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>もり</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>聖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>霊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> エーコ
name_jp_tl: Eco, Holy Spirit of the Forest
desc: When you take damage from an opponent's card effect: You can Special Summon this card from your hand, and if you do, inflict damage to your opponent equal to the damage you took, also both players take no further effect damage this turn.
mnst_eff: When you take damage from an opponent's card effect: You can Special Summon this card from your hand, and if you do, inflict damage to your opponent equal to the damage you took, also both players take no further effect damage this turn.
eff: When you take damage from an opponent's card effect: You can Special Summon this card from your hand, and if you do, inflict damage to your opponent equal to the damage you took, also both players take no further effect damage this turn.

action: Activates if you take effect damage
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
